column7: Typo – The dictionary misattributes the citation. It lists the verse as belonging to Naiṣadhacarita 2.34 (N. 2. 34). However, this is actually the opening line of Naiṣadhacarita 2.35. (Verse 2.34 ends with the phrase ...trivalibhrāji kṛtaṃ damasvasuḥ, whereas 2.35 begins with udaraṃ parimāti muṣṭinā...).
Typo – the past passive participle for the root kuts is kutsita.
